translations.### 何謂 Deferred Deep Link 與 Deep Link 的差: ### What is the Difference Between Deferred Deep Link and Deep Link?
translations.#### 完善 Deep Link APP 端處理：\n\n: #### Improve Deep Link Handling on the APP Side:
translations.#### 進入本文重點\n\n: #### Getting to the Point of This Article
translations.#### 首先我們要先加上「無則跳轉到 APP Store」提示使用者安裝 AP: #### First, we need to add a prompt for users to install the app if it's not installed, redirecting them to the APP Store:
translations.**SFSafariViewController 的 URL 該指向？**\n\: **What should the URL of SFSafariViewController point to?**
translations.**URL Scheme** 方式可在 AppDelegate 中的 `func: **URL Scheme** method can be handled in AppDelegate's `func application(_ application: UIApplication, open url: URL, sourceApplication: String?, annotation: Any) -> Bool`:
translations.**URL Scheme** 的部分是由系統控制，一般用於 APP 內呼叫鮮少公: The **URL Scheme** is controlled by the system and is generally used for internal app calls, rarely exposed publicly; if the trigger point is outside your control (e.g., Line links), it cannot be handled.
translations.**Universal Link** 則是在 AppDelegate 中的 `f: **Universal Link** is handled in the AppDelegate within `func application(_ application: UIApplication, continue userActivity: NSUserActivity, restorationHandler: @escaping ([Any]?) -> Void) -> Bool`:
translations.**Universal Link** 本身就是個自己的網頁，若無跳轉，預設就是使: **Universal Link** itself is a webpage. If no redirection occurs, it defaults to being displayed in a web browser. For those with web services, you can choose to redirect directly to the webpage; otherwise, redirect directly to the App Store page.
translations.**再說個坑：** 偷偷加載這件事，iOS ≥ 10 SFSafariViewC: **Another pitfall:** For iOS ≥ 10, if the SFSafariViewController's view size is set smaller than 1, opacity less than 0.05, or isHidden is true, the SFSafariViewController **will not load**.
translations.**要達成 Deferred Deep Link 的效果網路上有兩種做法：**\: **There are two common methods online to achieve Deferred Deep Link functionality:**
translations.*如果不想花時間自己做的話可以直接使用 [branch.io](http://b: *If you don't want to spend time building it yourself, you can directly use [branch.io](http://branch.io){:target="_blank"} or [Firebase Dynamic Links](https://firebase.google.com/docs/dynamic-links){:target="_blank"}. The method introduced in this article is the same approach used by Firebase.*
translations.*或可能要使用 JavaScript 與頁面內容進行交互，叫 JavaScrip: *It may be necessary to use JavaScript to interact with the page content, having JavaScript read the Cookie and return it to the UIViewController.*
translations.*根據官方文件，iOS 11 已無法取得使用者的 Safari Cookie，若: *According to official documentation, iOS 11 no longer allows access to users' Safari cookies. If needed, you can use SFAuthenticationSession, but this method cannot run stealthily in the background and will prompt the following dialog every time before loading:*
translations.*步驟繁瑣＆連結點擊僅限 Safari瀏覽器。*\n\n: *The steps are complicated & link clicking is limited to Safari browser.*
translations.*還有就是 APP審查是不允許將SFSafariViewController放在: *Also, app review does not allow placing SFSafariViewController where users cannot see it. (Triggering it programmatically and then adding it as a subview is less likely to be detected)*
translations.*雖然這樣也不是不行，但考慮到跳出流失率，多一個步驟就是多一層流失，還有使用者體: *Although this is possible, adding an extra step increases drop-off rates and results in a less smooth user experience; moreover, users may not be that savvy.*
translations.- [Due to iOS 14 updates, reading the cl: - [Due to iOS 14 updates, reading the clipboard will prompt the user. Please refer to this article if you plan to implement it.](../8a04443024e2/)
translations.1.當使用者有裝 APP 時點擊網址連結(Google搜尋來源、FB貼文、Lin: 1. When the user has the APP installed and clicks a URL link (from Google search, FB post, Line link, etc.), the APP opens directly to the target screen. If not installed, it redirects to the APP Store to install the APP; **after installation, opening the APP should reproduce the previously intended screen**.
translations.2.APP 下載和開啟數據追蹤，我們想知道 APP 推廣連結有多少人確實從這個入: 2. APP Download and Launch Data Tracking: We want to know how many people actually download and open the APP from the promotion link.
translations.3.特殊活動入口，例如透過特定網址下載後開啟能獲得獎勵。\n\n: 3. Special event entry points, such as downloading via a specific URL and opening the app to receive rewards.
translations.> *According to official documentation,: > *According to official documentation, iOS 11 no longer allows access to users' Safari cookies. If needed, you can use SFAuthenticationSession, but this method cannot run silently in the background and will show the following prompt every time before loading:*
translations.> *Also, app review does not allow placi: > *Also, app review does not allow placing SFSafariViewController where users cannot see it. (Triggering it programmatically and then adding it as a subview is less likely to be detected)*
translations.> *Although this is possible, adding an: > *Although this is possible, adding an extra step increases drop-off rates and results in a less smooth user experience; moreover, users may not be that savvy.*
translations.> *If you don't want to spend time build: > *If you don't want to spend time building it yourself, you can directly use [branch.io](http://branch.io){:target="_blank"} or [Firebase Dynamic Links](https://firebase.google.com/docs/dynamic-links){:target="_blank"}. The method introduced in this article is the same approach used by Firebase.*
translations.> *It may be necessary to use JavaScript: > *It may be necessary to use JavaScript to interact with the page content, having JavaScript read the Cookie and return it to the UIViewController.*
translations.> *The steps are complicated & link clic: > *The steps are complicated & link clicking is limited to the Safari browser.*
translations.> p.s iOS = 10 supports both Cookie and: > p.s iOS = 10 supports both Cookie and Pasteboard.
translations.[因應 iOS 14 更新，讀取剪貼簿時會提示使用者，如要實作請一併參考此篇文章: [Due to iOS 14 updates, reading the clipboard will prompt the user. Please refer to this article if you plan to implement it.](../8a04443024e2/)
translations.```\n\n點擊「Open」後你的剪貼簿就會被 JavaScript 自動覆蓋:
```

After clicking "Open," your clipboard will be automatically overwritten by JavaScript with the deep link information: https://XXX.app.goo.gl/?link=https://XXX.net/topicID=1&type=topic
```
translations.`func safariViewController(_ controller:: `func safariViewController(_ controller: SFSafariViewController, didCompleteInitialLoad didLoadSuccessfully: Bool) {`
translations.`let pasteData = UIPasteboard.general.st: `let pasteData = UIPasteboard.general.string`  // Get string data from the general pasteboard
translations.iOS = 9 不支援JavaScript自動剪貼簿但支援 **Safari 與: iOS = 9 does not support JavaScript automatic clipboard access but supports **Safari and APP SFSafariViewController "Cookie Sharing Method"**
translations.iOS ≥ 16 開始非使用者主動操作貼上動作，App 主動讀取剪貼簿的行為會跳: Starting from iOS 16, if the user does not actively perform a paste action, the app's attempt to read the clipboard will trigger a prompt. The user must grant permission for the app to access the clipboard data.
translations.iOS=9 的用戶已經非常稀少，不是很必要的話可以直接忽略；使用剪貼簿的方法快又: iOS 9 users are now very rare, so you can safely ignore them if not necessary; using the clipboard method is fast and efficient, and it also frees you from the limitation of opening links only in Safari!
translations.p.s iOS = 10 同時支援 Cookie 及 剪貼簿。\n\n: p.s iOS = 10 supports both Cookie and Pasteboard.
translations.web 端也算好處理，就是改成使用者點擊「立即前往」時將我們要帶給 APP 的資: The web side is also easy to handle. When the user clicks "Go Now," store the information we want to pass to the APP in a Cookie (`marry://topicID=1&type=topic`), then use `location.href` to redirect to the APP Store page.
translations.一種是透過使用者裝置、IP、環境…等等參數計算出一個雜湊值，在網頁端存入資料到伺: One method is to calculate a hash value based on user device, IP, environment, etc., and store data on the server from the web side; after the app is installed and opened, the same calculation is done, and if the values match, the data is retrieved and restored (the approach used by branch.io).
translations.何謂 Deferred Deep Link？，延遲深度連結；就是讓我們的 Dee: What is Deferred Deep Link? Deferred Deep Link allows our Deep Link to retain source data even after the app is installed from the App Store.
translations.使用 iPhone Safari 瀏覽網頁版上方就會出現 APP 安裝提示、使用: When browsing the web version on iPhone Safari, an APP installation prompt and a button to open the current page in the APP will appear at the top; the parameter `app-argument` is used to pass page values and transmit them to the APP.
translations.先講簡單的，只考慮 iOS ≥ 10 以上的用戶，單純使用 iPhone 剪貼簿: Let's keep it simple and only consider iOS users with version ≥ 10, using the iPhone clipboard to transfer information.
translations.先附上一個 URL 的擴充方法 queryParameters，用於方便將 UR: First, here is an extension method for URL called queryParameters, which helps convert URL queries into a Swift Dictionary.
translations.到這步，你可能會想再來就是在 `didCompleteInitialLoad`: At this point, you might think the next step is to read the cookies inside the webpage in `didCompleteInitialLoad` to complete the process!
translations.前文有提到原理，我們要在主頁的UIViewController用程式偷偷加載一個: The principle was mentioned earlier. We need to secretly load an SFSafariViewController in the background within the main UIViewController without the user noticing.
translations.前文附上的 JavaScript 處理 Cookie 的方法中的 getCook: The getCookie() method from the previously attached JavaScript for handling cookies is used here. Our "cookie reading page" is a blank page (users won't see it anyway), but the JavaScript part needs to read the cookie after the body onload:
translations.加上「無則跳轉到 APP Store」的流程圖\n\n: Flowchart Including "If None, Redirect to APP Store"
translations.動手打造適應所有場景、不中斷的App轉跳流程\n\n: Build a Seamless App Redirect Flow That Works in All Scenarios
translations.另一種是本文要介紹的方法，同 Firebase 作法；使用 iPhone 剪貼簿: Another method introduced in this article, similar to Firebase's approach, uses the iPhone clipboard and the Safari-App cookie sharing mechanism. This means storing data in the clipboard or cookies, which the app reads and uses after installation.
translations.另外 Firebase 也不提供進行樣式修改。\n\n: Firebase also does not provide options for style customization.
translations.另外在 APP 需要偷偷在背景加入 SFSafariViewController: Also, the APP needs to secretly add a SFSafariViewController in the background to load the Web, then retrieve the previously saved cookie information from the Web.
translations.可以看到 iOS Deep Link 本身運作機制只有判斷 APP 有無安裝，有: You can see that the iOS Deep Link mechanism only checks whether the app is installed; if it is, it opens the app, otherwise it does nothing.
translations.同 Web 端分享頁面，我們要再刻一個 For 讀取 Cookie 的頁面，並將: Like the web sharing page, we need to create another page for reading cookies and place both pages under the same domain to avoid cross-domain cookie issues. The page content will be provided later.
translations.在 AppDelegate 或 主頁 UIViewController 中讀取剪: Read the value from the pasteboard in AppDelegate or the main UIViewController:
translations.在這裡我沒找到讀取 SFSafariViewController Cookie: I couldn't find a method here to read cookies from SFSafariViewController; all online methods return empty.
translations.在閱讀 [做自己的生命設計師](https://www.books.com.tw: While reading [Be Your Own Life Designer](https://www.books.com.tw/products/0010733134){:target="_blank"} to rethink my life plan, I reflected on my work and life. Although my technical skills are not very strong, writing on Medium and sharing with others allows me to enter a "flow" state and gain a lot of energy. Recently, a friend asked me about Deep Link issues, so I took the chance to organize my research methods and refresh my energy!
translations.大略邏輯是 **一樣呼叫 URL Scheme，然後設個 Timeout，時間到: The general logic is **to call the URL Scheme, then set a timeout. If the timeout expires and the page hasn't redirected, assume the app is not installed and cannot call the scheme, then redirect to the App Store page** (though the experience is still not ideal and may show a URL error message, but it adds automatic redirection).
translations.如圖所示，如果是 未安裝 -> APP Store 安裝 -> APP Stor: As shown in the figure, if the flow is Not Installed -> App Store Installation -> Opened from App Store, the data passed from the source will be interrupted. The app won't know the source and will only display the home page. The user must go back to the previous webpage and click open again for the app to trigger the page jump.
translations.如果 APP 只考慮 iOS ≥ 10 以上的話容易許多，APP 實作剪貼簿存取: If the app only targets iOS ≥ 10, it becomes much easier. The app implements clipboard access, the web uses JavaScript to overwrite the clipboard with information, and then redirects to the App Store for download.
If it feels cumbersome, you can directly use [branch.io](http://branch.io){:target="_blank"} or [Firebase Dynamic](https://firebase.google.com/docs/dynamic-links){:target="_blank"}. There's no need to reinvent the wheel. Here, we built our own solution due to interface customization and some complex requirements.
translations.實際的原理總結就是：在 `HomeViewController viewDidL: The actual principle summary is: in `HomeViewController viewDidLoad`, add an `SFSafariViewController` to secretly load the `loadCookie.html` page. The `loadCookie.html` page reads and checks previously stored cookies; if found, it reads and clears them, then uses `window.location.href` to trigger the `URL Scheme` mechanism.
translations.我們仿造 Firebase Dynamic Links 客製化刻了自己的頁面，使: We customized our own page by imitating Firebase Dynamic Links, using the `clipboard.js` library to copy the information we want to pass to the APP (`marry://topicID=1&type=topic`) to the clipboard when the user clicks "Go Now," and then use `location.href` to redirect to the App Store page.
translations.我們要的當然不只是「當使用者有安裝 APP 則開啟 APP」，我們還要將來源資訊: What we want is not just "open the APP if the user has it installed," but also to link the source information with the APP, so that when the APP opens, it automatically displays the target page within the APP.
translations.我這邊的做法是在 主頁的UIViewController 上方放一個 UIVie: My approach is to place a UIView with any height above the main UIViewController on the homepage, aligning its bottom with the top of the main UIView. Then, connect an IBOutlet (`sharedCookieView`) to the class. In viewDidLoad(), initialize an SFSafariViewController and add its view to `sharedCookieView`. This way, it actually loads and displays, but the screen is off-screen so the user cannot see it 🌝.
translations.所以之後對應的 CallBack 處理就會回到 `AppDelegate` 中的: So the corresponding callback handling will return to the `AppDelegate`'s `func application(_ application: UIApplication, open url: URL, sourceApplication: String?, annotation: Any) -> Bool` for processing.
translations.據 Android 工程師表示 Android 本身就有此功能，但在 iOS 上: According to Android engineers, Android natively supports this feature, but iOS does not support this setting, and achieving this functionality on iOS is not user-friendly. Please continue reading.
translations.方法中捕獲載入完成事件。\n\n: Capture the load completion event in the method.
translations.既然 iOS 不知到如何取得共享的 Cookie，那我們就直接交由「讀取 Coo: Since iOS cannot directly access shared Cookies, we let the "page that reads the Cookie" handle the "Cookie reading" for us.
translations.最後在處理完動作後使用 `UIPasteboard.general.string: Finally, clear the information in the clipboard by using `UIPasteboard.general.string = “”` after completing the action.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有網頁服務的網站可以在 `<head></head>` 中加入：\n\n: Web service websites can add the following inside the `<head></head>` section:
translations.本文最麻煩的地方來了。\n\n: Here comes the most troublesome part of this article.
translations.畢業當完兵到現在庸庸碌碌工作了快三年，成長已趨於平緩，開始進入舒適圈，所幸心一橫: After graduating and completing military service, I have been working aimlessly for almost three years. My growth has plateaued, and I started to settle into my comfort zone. Fortunately, I made a firm decision to resign, take a break, and start anew.
translations.目前看來已經很完美了，我們處理了所有會遇到的狀況，那還缺什麼？\n\n: It seems perfect now. We've handled all possible scenarios. So, what else is missing?
translations.相信有套過 Firebase Dynamic Links 的人一定不陌生這個開啟: Those who have used Firebase Dynamic Links are surely familiar with this redirect page. Once you understand the principle, you'll know that this page cannot be removed from the process!
translations.若觸發點在自身網頁上可以使用些小技巧處理，請參考 [**這裡**](https:: If the trigger point is on your own webpage, you can use some tricks to handle it. Please refer to [**here**](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/627916/check-if-url-scheme-is-supported-in-javascript){:target="_blank"}:
translations.這裡提供兩個封裝好的 JavaScript 處理 Cookie 的方法，加速開發: Here are two encapsulated JavaScript methods for handling Cookies to speed up development:
translations.這邊建議還是將資訊使用 URL Scheme 方式包裝，方便進行辨識、資料反解：: It is recommended to package the information using URL Scheme for easy identification and data parsing:
translations.需要加上這個 Delegate 才能捕獲載入完成後的 CallBack 處理。\: You need to add this Delegate to capture the callback after the loading is complete.
translations.首先要先說明實際應用場景。\n\n: First, the actual use case needs to be explained.
translations.首先講個坑，支援度問題；如前所說的「不友善」！\n\n: First, let's talk about a pitfall: support issues; as mentioned before, it's "unfriendly"!
translations.麻煩的來了，支援 iOS 9 版，前文有說由於不支援剪貼簿，要使用 **Cook: Here comes the tricky part: to support iOS 9, as mentioned earlier, since clipboard access is not supported, we need to use the **Cookie Sharing Method**.
